title: Professional Quality Tapered Diamond File Assorted Grits 10 Piece Set
description:
This hobby file set has 10 different files for an array of different jobs and tasks whether it is for models, or detailed metal work. Each file is 5.5" in length and features small 2.5" dipped rubber handles for precision craftsmanship. Includes PVC storage pouch. There are nine flat files with three different widths and one round file. The set has varied grits identified by the handle color. Red: 180 Grit Yellow: 260 Grit Green: 360 Grit Because of its incredible variety this file set can help on almost any project type. Make sure to pick one up today!
